title: VCC Issuer Keyset (v0.2)
description: Portable JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) for the issuer keyset served at the issuer's key-discovery URL. Mirrors `issuerKeySetSchema` / `issuerKeySchema` in verifiers/typescript/src/schemas.ts. CONTRACT §3: `issuer` is a safe-https URL (full SSRF/localhost/private-IP checks enforced by the verifier at runtime). CONTRACT §4: validFrom/validUntil are fixed-width UTC timestamps; when validUntil != null, validFrom <= validUntil (string compare) is enforced by the verifier.

utcTimestamp.$comment: CONTRACT §4 / ISSUED_AT_RE. Bounds month/day/hour/minute/second as tightly as a regex allows. Full calendar validity (leap-year day count, no leap-second 60) enforced by the verifier's isValidUtcTimestamp at runtime.

issuer.$comment: CONTRACT §3: safe-https URL, max 200. format:uri + https:// prefix; verifier enforces no-userinfo / no-localhost / no-private-IP.

publicKey.$comment: Raw 32-byte Ed25519 key -> 44 base64 chars with padding. BASE64_STD_RE bounded 42..46.
